links.targetTitle: DocumentToolbar exposes className enabledControls and callback props
Revision History panel styling requires scoped CSS on document-editor-context since no props are exposed

title: The revision history timeline lets users navigate document history visually, putting the editor into read-only mode at a selected revision
content: To enable timeline in an editor, the editor module exports the configuration and the Drive-app or default app fetches timeline items via `useTimelineItems(documentId)` from `@powerhousedao/common`. When a user clicks a timeline candle, `getRevisionFromDate(startDate, endDate, operations.global)` resolves the revision number. The editor receives `context.readMode = true` and `context.selectedTimelineRevision`. The editor then calls `getDocumentRevision({ revisions: { global: selectedTimelineRevision } })` to fetch the document at that point in time and disables edit controls. The timeline only activates once a document has some operation history.
description: Timeline uses useTimelineItems hook and getRevisionFromDate; selecting a candle activates read-only mode.
